label: Survey cycle
labelLong: CCHS survey cycle
subject: demographics
description: Derived from dataset name; identifies CCHS cycle for each respondent
purpose: Identifies the CCHS cycle for each respondent. Used to derive survey year for the period component of the APC model and to label cycle-specific results.

label: Age
labelLong: Age (grouped)
subject: demographics
description: Age in grouped years. Used with birth year to derive cohort = survey_year - age
purpose: Grouped age category. Used to exclude respondents aged 12-17 (age_exclusion_category = 1) before APC analysis. Not used directly in the model.

label: Age (grouped continuous, years)
labelLong: Age - continuous
subject: demographics
description: Continuous age; preferred over DHHGAGE_A for APC model where available
purpose: Continuous age in years (midpoint-estimated in PUMF). The primary age input to the APC model. Cohort is derived as survey_year - age.

label: Sex
labelLong: Sex
subject: demographics
description: Sex (1=Male 2=Female). APC models run separately by sex
purpose: Sex. APC initiation and cessation models are fit separately for men and women because smoking trends differ substantially by sex. Also used to stratify Table 1.

label: Province of residence
labelLong: Province of residence
subject: demographics
description: Province/territory of residence. Used for provincial APC estimates
purpose: Province of residence. Used for provincial APC stratification (Stage 8 subgroup). Territories are pooled due to small sample sizes.

label: Master survey weight
labelLong: Survey sampling weight
subject: demographics
description: CCHS sampling weight. Required for all prevalence estimates and weighted APC models
purpose: Survey sampling weight. Applied in APC logistic regression as a case weight to produce nationally representative estimates.

label: Immigrant status (2007-2014 only)
labelLong: Immigrant status (D)
subject: demographics
description: Immigrant status derived (1=non-immigrant 2=immigrant 3=non-permanent resident). Used in MPoRT mortality adjustment
purpose: Immigrant status. Used in the MPoRT mortality correction to adjust for survival bias. Only available 2007-2014.

label: Cultural/racial origin (2007-2014 only)
labelLong: Cultural or racial origin (D/G)
subject: demographics
description: Cultural/racial origin. Not in all cycles (NA(c) where absent). Used for subgroup analysis; not a primary APC model variable
purpose: Cultural/racial origin. Retained for potential subgroup analyses. Only available in select cycles; will be NA(c) elsewhere.

label: Education (3-cat)
labelLong: Highest education level - 3 categories
subject: demographics
description: Highest education (3-category: less than high school / high school graduate / post-secondary). Used for subgroup analysis. cchsflow harmonized from EDUADR04/EDUCDR04/EDUEDR04/EHG2DVR3.
purpose: Education (3-category). Included for descriptive purposes and potential subgroup analysis. Not available in 2019-20 or 2022 PUMF.

label: Smoked 100+ cigs
labelLong: Ever smoked 100 or more cigarettes in lifetime
subject: smoking
description: Gate question: ever smoked >=100 cigarettes lifetime. Combined with SMK_01B and SMK_202 for never/current/former classification
purpose: Intermediate: input to SMKDSTY_A derivation. Gate variable: ever smoked 100+ cigarettes. Combined with SMK_01B and SMK_202 to classify respondents as never/current/former smoker for the APC numerator.

label: Smoked 1 whole cig
labelLong: Ever smoked a whole cigarette
subject: smoking
description: Second gate for never-smoker definition: never smoked a whole cigarette AND <100 lifetime cigarettes = never smoker
purpose: Intermediate: input to SMKDSTY_A derivation. Gate variable: ever smoked a whole cigarette. Used with SMK_01A to define never-smoker status.

label: Smoking type
labelLong: Type of smoker presently (daily/occasional/not at all)
subject: smoking
description: Current smoking frequency. Combined with SMK_01A/SMK_01B to derive 3-category status: never / current / former
purpose: Intermediate: input to SMKDSTY_A derivation. Current smoking frequency (daily/occasional/not at all). Combined with SMK_01A/SMK_01B to derive 3-category smoking status.

label: Smoking status (6-cat)
labelLong: Type of smoker derived - 6-category (cchsflow v3, original StatCan scheme)
subject: smoking
description: cchsflow v3 harmonized 6-cat smoking status: 1=daily, 2=occ(fmr daily), 3=always occasional, 4=former daily, 5=former occasional, 6=never. Consistent categories across all cycles.
purpose: Primary smoking classification for APC numerator construction and Table 1. Uses calculate_SMKDSTY_A() for consistent categories across all cycles.
reviewNotes: Renamed from SMKDSTY_A per CEP-002 year-based naming

label: Age 1st cig (unified)*
labelLong: Age smoked first whole cigarette - unified (cchsflow v3)
subject: smoking
description: Unified variable (cchsflow v3 PR #163). Master: exact age (SMK_01C); PUMF: midpoint-estimated (SMKG01C_cont). Primary initiation age input
purpose: Age at first whole cigarette (unified cchsflow v3 variable). Primary input for the initiation APC numerator. Routes to exact values (Master) or midpoint estimates (PUMF) automatically.

label: Age daily (unified)*
labelLong: Age started smoking daily - unified (cchsflow v3)
subject: smoking
description: Unified variable (cchsflow v3 PR #163). Master: exact age (SMK_040); PUMF: midpoint-estimated (SMKG040_cont). Primary daily initiation age
purpose: Age started smoking daily (unified cchsflow v3 variable). Used in the initiation APC model as an alternative or supplementary age measure.

label: Yrs quit daily (unified)*
labelLong: Years since stopped smoking daily - unified (cchsflow v3)
subject: smoking
description: Unified variable (cchsflow v3). PUMF: midpoint from SMK_09A_cont; Master: exact from SMK_09C. Former daily smokers only.
purpose: Primary input for the cessation APC numerator. Covers former daily smokers.

label: Yrs quit daily (PUMF)
labelLong: Years since stopped smoking daily - former daily (PUMF continuous)
subject: smoking
description: PUMF-derived continuous years since quit. Superseded by time_quit_smoking once cchsflow v3 merges. Keep for pre-v3 fallback
purpose: PUMF years since quit (former daily smokers). Pre-cchsflow v3 fallback for time_quit_smoking when the unified variable is unavailable.

label: Yrs quit occ (PUMF)
labelLong: Years since stopped smoking - former occasional smokers (PUMF continuous)
subject: smoking
description: PUMF-derived years since quit for former occasional smokers. Not covered by time_quit_smoking (daily only)
purpose: PUMF years since quit (former occasional smokers). Not covered by time_quit_smoking (daily only). Retained for completeness.

label: Yrs since quit (all)
labelLong: Years since quit smoking completely - all former smokers (continuous)
subject: smoking
description: StatCan derived continuous years since quit (all former smokers). Available 2009+. Preferred where available; cross-validate with SMK_09A_cont
purpose: StatsCan derived years since quit (all former smokers). Available from 2007 onward. Cross-validates SMK_09A_cont estimates.

label: Cigs/day (current)
labelLong: Number of cigarettes smoked daily - current daily smokers
subject: smoking
description: Smoking intensity - current daily smokers. Input to intensity (CPD) model
purpose: Cigarettes per day for current daily smokers. Input to smoking intensity descriptive tables and future intensity model.

label: Cigs/day (former)
labelLong: Number of cigarettes smoked daily - former daily smokers
subject: smoking
description: Smoking intensity - former daily smokers (peak CPD while smoking). Input to intensity model
purpose: Cigarettes per day for former daily smokers (peak while smoking). Input to smoking intensity descriptive tables.

label: Age first cigarette (PUMF grouped)
subject: smoking
description: PUMF grouped age first cigarette (recoded to midpoints). Intermediate input to age_first_cigarette (cchsflow v3).
purpose: Intermediate: PUMF grouped age first cigarette recoded to midpoints. Required by cchsflow v3 to compute age_first_cigarette.

label: Age started daily smoking (PUMF grouped)
subject: smoking
description: PUMF grouped age started daily smoking (recoded to midpoints). Intermediate input to age_start_smoking (cchsflow v3).
purpose: Intermediate: PUMF grouped age started daily smoking recoded to midpoints. Required by cchsflow v3 to compute age_start_smoking.

label: Time since quit (master)
subject: smoking
description: Master file derived time since quit smoking (all former smokers). Intermediate input to time_quit_smoking (cchsflow v3). Not available in PUMF.
purpose: Intermediate: Master file derived time since quit (all former smokers). Required by cchsflow v3 to compute time_quit_smoking. Not available in PUMF.

label: Cigs/day (unified)*
labelLong: Cigarettes per day - unified daily + former daily (cchsflow v3)
subject: smoking
description: Unified cigs/day (cchsflow v3). Combines SMK_204 (current daily) and SMK_208 (former daily) automatically.
purpose: Smoking intensity for descriptive tables and future dose-response models.

label: Pack-years (unified)*
labelLong: Cumulative pack-years - derived (cchsflow v3)
subject: smoking
description: Cumulative pack-years (cchsflow v3). Derived from cigs_per_day and years smoked.
purpose: Cumulative smoking exposure measure for descriptive tables.
